query:
SELECT media_item_id as id
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    media_item_id,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rank ASC) as rn,
                    COUNT(*) OVER () as total_count
                FROM album_media_item
                WHERE album_id = $1
            ) t
            WHERE rn = (total_count / 2) + 1
            LIMIT 1
